data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Shipping if not pickup', but the evidence does not confirm that shipping is properly handled when the customer opts for it instead of pickup. While the linked use case mentions shipping options, there is no concrete evidence showing that the system correctly implements this functionality. The absence of specific evidence regarding the shipping process leads to a clear gap in validation.
gaps: No evidence confirming that shipping is executed when the customer chooses not to pick up the products.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
